result.reasoning: The audio file provided contains a compilation of ragtime piano pieces, specifically compositions by Scott Joplin. By analyzing the audio at the specified timestamp (around the 2-minute mark), the distinct melody and rhythmic structure identify the piece beginning at that point. The track playing before this mark ends, and the new song, characterized by its syncopated ragtime style in the key of A-flat major (often played in B-flat or A-flat in compilations), is "Gladiolus Rag". It is one of Scott Joplin's well-known rags, written in 1907.
